criteria_verification.evidence: Created src/forge/pipeline/constitutional_guard.py defining class ConstitutionalGuard. TestClassLocation verifies the class is importable and lives in forge.pipeline (parent dir name == 'pipeline', file stem == 'constitutional_guard').
criteria_verification.notes: Created src/forge/pipeline/constitutional_guard.py defining class ConstitutionalGuard. TestClassLocation verifies the class is importable and lives in forge.pipeline (parent dir name == 'pipeline', file stem == 'constitutional_guard').

criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented ConstitutionalGuard.veto_auto_approve() that branches on `stage in self.constitutional_stages` and returns AutoApproveDecision(verdict=AutoApproveVerdict.REFUSED, ...). The signature accepts only the stage — there is no Coach-score parameter, so a max-score signal cannot be smuggled through. TestVetoAutoApprove (parametrised over CONSTITUTIONAL_STAGES) and TestGroupCNegativeRegression.test_max_coach_score_does_not_bypass_auto_approve_refusal verify the property.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented ConstitutionalGuard.veto_auto_approve() that branches on `stage in self.constitutional_stages` and returns AutoApproveDecision(verdict=AutoApproveVerdict.REFUSED, ...). The signature accepts only the stage — there is no Coach-score parameter, so a max-score signal cannot be smuggled through. TestVetoAutoApprove (parametrised over CONSTITUTIONAL_STAGES) and TestGroupCNegativeRegression.test_max_coach_score_does_not_bypass_auto_approve_refusal verify the property.

criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented ConstitutionalGuard.veto_skip() returning SkipDecision(verdict=SkipVerdict.REFUSED_CONSTITUTIONAL, ...) for constitutional stages. TestVetoSkip.test_constitutional_stage_returns_refused_constitutional_verdict (parametrised) and TestGroupCNegativeRegression.test_skip_directive_refused_for_constitutional_stage verify the verdict.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented ConstitutionalGuard.veto_skip() returning SkipDecision(verdict=SkipVerdict.REFUSED_CONSTITUTIONAL, ...) for constitutional stages. TestVetoSkip.test_constitutional_stage_returns_refused_constitutional_verdict (parametrised) and TestGroupCNegativeRegression.test_skip_directive_refused_for_constitutional_stage verify the verdict.

criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented ConstitutionalGuard.veto_override_claim() — the body executes `del claim` then returns `stage in self.constitutional_stages`, making the claim payload definitionally irrelevant. TestVetoOverrideClaim.test_constitutional_stage_ignores_override_claim passes a forged authority claim ({specialist, authority='override', signed=True, ...}) and asserts the result is True. TestGroupESecurityRegression.test_specialist_override_claim_ignored repeats with a richer claim to pin the security canary.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Returns include a structured rationale string suitable for recording in
criteria_verification.evidence: AutoApproveDecision and SkipDecision are frozen dataclasses with a non-optional `rationale: str` field. Module-level templates _AUTO_APPROVE_REFUSED_RATIONALE, _SKIP_REFUSED_RATIONALE, etc. format the stage into a structured citation referencing 'ADR-ARCH-026 belt-and-braces'. TestVetoAutoApprove.test_decision_includes_structured_rationale_string and the SkipDecision counterpart assert isinstance(rationale, str), non-empty, and 'ADR-ARCH-026' substring.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Unit tests cover Group C @negative @regression scenarios:
criteria_verification.evidence: TestGroupCNegativeRegression contains test_max_coach_score_does_not_bypass_auto_approve_refusal (loops every CONSTITUTIONAL_STAGES entry and asserts is_refused), test_skip_directive_refused_for_constitutional_stage (likewise for skip), and test_idempotent_repeated_calls_return_equal_decisions (pins idempotency so a stateful regression cannot 'cool off' refusal).
criteria_verification.notes: TestGroupCNegativeRegression contains test_max_coach_score_does_not_bypass_auto_approve_refusal (loops every CONSTITUTIONAL_STAGES entry and asserts is_refused), test_skip_directive_refused_for_constitutional_stage (likewise for skip), and test_idempotent_repeated_calls_return_equal_decisions (pins idempotency so a stateful regression cannot 'cool off' refusal).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Unit tests cover Group E @security @regression scenarios:
criteria_verification.evidence: TestGroupESecurityRegression contains test_holds_against_misconfigured_prompt (no prompt is wired into the executor-layer guard at all — the guard refuses on stage alone), test_specialist_override_claim_ignored (forged authority claim ignored), and test_belt_and_braces_layer_independent_of_constitutional_stages_set (constructs ConstitutionalGuard(frozenset()) to prove there is no hard-coded fallback that could survive a CONSTITUTIONAL_STAGES drift).
criteria_verification.notes: TestGroupESecurityRegression contains test_holds_against_misconfigured_prompt (no prompt is wired into the executor-layer guard at all — the guard refuses on stage alone), test_specialist_override_claim_ignored (forged authority claim ignored), and test_belt_and_braces_layer_independent_of_constitutional_stages_set (constructs ConstitutionalGuard(frozenset()) to prove there is no hard-coded fallback that could survive a CONSTITUTIONAL_STAGES drift).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Pure function — no I/O, no async
criteria_verification.evidence: Module imports only stdlib (dataclasses, enum, typing) and forge.pipeline.stage_taxonomy. No async def, no awaitables. TestPureFunction.test_methods_are_synchronous parametrises over the three veto methods and asserts asyncio.iscoroutinefunction is False. TestPureFunction.test_module_imports_no_io_libraries reads the module source and asserts forbidden tokens (import os/io/socket/requests/httpx/asyncio/aiohttp, from pathlib, open() ) are absent.

Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `python-api-specialist` (Implementation)
No seam tests detected for cross-boundary feature. Consider adding seam/contract/boundary tests to validate technology boundary interactions. This is a recommendation, not a blocking gate.

rationale: All quality gates passed. Independent verification confirmed. All acceptance criteria met. Architecture context: 299 chars provided.
